subcodes.first_line: O Javád! The world hath been transformed, inasmuch as the Kingdom of Utterance hath been renewed. All that existeth and cometh forth hath been adorned with glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد عالم تبدیل شده چه که ملکوت بیان تجدید گشت آنچه موجود و مقبل بطراز
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution
